# komodo_build (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo build resource by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_build" "example" {
  id = "my-app"
}

output "build_image_name" {
  value = data.komodo_build.example.image_name
}
```

## Argument Reference

- `id` (Required) - The build identifier (ObjectId or name).

## Attribute Reference

- `name` - The unique name of the build.
- `builder_id` - The ID of the builder used.
- `version` - The current semantic version block.
  - `major` - Major version component.
  - `minor` - Minor version component.
  - `patch` - Patch version component.
- `auto_increment_version` - Whether the patch version is automatically incremented.
- `image_name` - Override for the image name.
- `image_tag` - Extra tag suffix applied to the built image.
- `include_latest_tag` - Whether a `:latest` tag is pushed.
- `include_version_tags` - Whether individual semver component tags are pushed.
- `include_commit_tag` - Whether a git commit hash tag is pushed.
- `links` - Quick links associated with this build.
- `linked_repo` - The name of the linked Komodo Repo resource.
- `git_provider` - Git provider domain.
- `git_https` - Whether HTTPS is used for git access.
- `git_account` - Git account used for private repositories.
- `repo` - Repository path.
- `branch` - Branch built from.
- `commit` - Specific commit hash built.
- `webhook_enabled` - Whether webhook triggering is enabled.
- `webhook_secret` - The webhook secret override (sensitive).
- `files_on_host` - Whether host filesystem files are used instead of a git repository.
- `build_path` - Path to the Docker build context directory.
- `dockerfile_path` - Path to the Dockerfile.
- `image_registry` - Image registry configurations.
  - `domain` - Registry provider domain.
  - `account` - Account used with this registry.
  - `organization` - Organization name within the registry account.
- `skip_secret_interp` - Whether secret interpolation in build args is skipped.
- `use_buildx` - Whether `docker buildx` is used.
- `extra_args` - Additional arguments passed to `docker build`.
- `pre_build` - Command run before the Docker build.
  - `path` - The working directory for the command.
  - `command` - The shell command to run.
- `dockerfile` - Inline Dockerfile contents.
- `build_args` - Docker build arguments.
- `secret_args` - Docker secret build arguments (sensitive).
- `labels` - Docker image labels.
